children.heading: Strategic plan
children.label: a Strategic plan
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , the Working Group, after consultation with the relevant stakeholders, shall submit to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate, the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate, the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate, the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives, and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives a 5-year integrated strategic plan on combating IUU fishing and enhancing maritime security, including specific strategies with monitoring benchmarks for addressing IUU fishing in priority regions.December 20, 2019

children.heading: Identification of priority regions and priority flag states
children.label: b Identification of priority regions and priority flag states

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The strategic plan submitted under subsection (a) shall identify priority regions and priority flag states to be the focus of assistance coordinated by the Working Group under .section 8031 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: are at high risk for IUU fishing activity or the entry of illegally caught seafood into their markets; and

children.label: B
children.text: lack the capacity to fully address the issues described in subparagraph (A).

children.label: A
children.text: the flagged vessels of which actively engage in, knowingly profit from, or are complicit in IUU fishing; and

children.label: B
children.text: that lack the capacity to police their fleet.
